name: compose-key-follow
note: UAT r5 F1+F2 (operator 2026-07-19: 'seeing suggestions that are out of key... the chord builder seems to stay on C major - when I continue building I expect the key I'm working in'). Root cause: the D-DEFAULT-C landing key is marked explicit, so the untouched DEFAULT outranks the music everywhere (auto-infer never runs, canvas templates realize in C, Continue building never re-keys). Contract under test: a DEFAULTED key follows the music (infer on add, song-derived on canvas entry / continue-building); a key the user actually picked stays pinned. Also carries the F3/F4 section-card goalposts (duplicate button wears the shared halo primitive; the longest built-in label renders un-truncated). Red-first on the v195 tree.

steps.label: F1a: the untouched default key FOLLOWS the music - A D E re-keys the chip to A, not stuck on C Maj
F1b: canvas templates realize in the WORKING key - every chip starts from A-space, none renders the C realization
steps.js: (function(){var t=Array.prototype.map.call(document.querySelectorAll('.ssChords'),function(x){return x.textContent.trim();});return t.length>0 && t.every(function(x){return /^A[ m]/.test(x)||x.indexOf('A ')===0;}) && !t.some(function(x){return x==='F G C'||x==='C G Am F';});})()

steps.label: pick the Pre-Chorus label for the hop's Add (the longest built-in label - the F4 width case)
F4: the Pre-Chorus card shows its ENTIRE name (no ellipsis clipping) at phone width
F3: the duplicate button wears the SAME 36px circular halo primitive as its play/edit siblings
name the song and save it (name-row completion)
steps.js: (function(){var row=document.querySelector('.composeRow.asModal');if(!row)return false;var inp=row.querySelector('input');if(!inp)return false;inp.value='Key Follow Jam';inp.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}));var btns=row.querySelectorAll('button');for(var i=0;i<btns.length;i++){if(/save/i.test(btns[i].textContent)){btns[i].click();return true;}}return false;})()

steps.label: open the saved song from the Library (row text carries title + meta, so match by contains)
F2: Continue building lands IN THE SONG'S KEY on a fresh boot - chip re-keyed to A Maj, not the C default
F2b: and the canvas templates follow that key too (A-space chips, no C realizations)
steps.js: (function(){var t=Array.prototype.map.call(document.querySelectorAll('.ssChords'),function(x){return x.textContent.trim();});return t.length>0 && t.every(function(x){return /^A[ m]/.test(x)||x.indexOf('A ')===0;}) && !t.some(function(x){return x==='F G C'||x==='C G Am F';});})()

steps.label: UAT r6: leaving the canvas, the NAMED draft chip carries the song's title as the way back
